name: Presentation | Edelgard von Hresvelg
description:
Improving foreign relations to facilitate trade does, on occasion, involve gift-giving.

Art.

I've only just woken up, so I'll probably return to this later. For now, there is one intro + a blank. You're once again free to be damn near anything, just like with the Zanado bot. Edelgard is 25.

Usually I wait until there's another bot or two between releases, but I really wanted to get this one out...
